TestCase z25Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    int* follow_case_a = (int*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(int));
    memcpy(follow_case_a, t1.a, t1.n * sizeof(int));
    follow_case.a = follow_case_a;
    // ------------------------------------

    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n < 2
    if (follow_case.n < 2) {
        // Not enough elements to perform a meaningful rotation
        return follow_case;
    }

    // Specific operation: rotate subarray (the whole array) left by k positions
    // k is a random value within the array length
    int k = rand() % follow_case.n;
    if (k > 0) {
        // Allocate temporary storage for the first k elements
        int* temp = (int*)malloc(k * sizeof(int));
        memcpy(temp, follow_case.a, k * sizeof(int));

        // Shift the remaining elements to the front
        memmove(follow_case.a, follow_case.a + k, (follow_case.n - k) * sizeof(int));

        // Copy the saved elements to the end
        memcpy(follow_case.a + follow_case.n - k, temp, k * sizeof(int));

        free(temp);
    }

    return follow_case;
}
